{%- set bank_accounts = get_rmax_company_bank_accounts(doc.company) -%} {%- set zatca_qr = get_rmax_zatca_qr(doc) -%} {%- set customer_phone = get_rmax_customer_phone(doc) -%} {%- set letter_head_html = get_rmax_letter_head_html(doc) -%} {%- set is_return = doc.is_return == 1 -%} {%- set title_en = "CASH RETURN" if is_return else "TAX INVOICE" -%} {%- set title_ar = "مرتجع نقدي" if is_return else "فاتورة ضريبية" -%} {%- set prepared_by_user = doc.get("custom_prepared_by") or doc.owner -%} {%- set prepared_by_name = frappe.db.get_value("User", prepared_by_user, "full_name") or prepared_by_user -%} {%- set prepared_by_mobile = frappe.db.get_value("User", prepared_by_user, "mobile_no") or "" -%} {%- set approved_by_user = doc.get("custom_approved_by") -%} {%- set approved_by_name = (frappe.db.get_value("User", approved_by_user, "full_name") or approved_by_user) if approved_by_user else "" -%} {%- set cust = frappe.get_cached_doc("Customer", doc.customer) -%} {%- set cust_addr = frappe.db.get_value("Address", doc.customer_address, ["address_line1","address_line2","city","pincode"], as_dict=True) if doc.customer_address else None -%} {%- set vat_no = cust.tax_id or cust.get("custom_vat_registration_number") or "" -%}
